allow: PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "d:\\software\\vscode\\yunhe_cc_project"; if \(Test-Path ".git"\) { Write-Output "Git repo already exists"; & "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\git.exe" status --short } else { Write-Output "No git repo yet — need to init" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); $git = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\git.exe"; Set-Location "d:\\software\\vscode\\yunhe_cc_project"; & $git add README.md; & $git commit -m "Add README with detailed project description"; & $git push origin main)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); $git = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\git.exe"; Set-Location "d:\\software\\vscode\\yunhe_cc_project"; & $git add -A; & $git commit -m "v2.0: Warm bright color scheme + Chinese README"; & $git tag -a v2.0 -m "Version 2.0: Warm bright color scheme, improved contrast, Chinese README"; Write-Output "---COMMIT---"; & $git log --oneline -3; Write-Output "---TAGS---"; & $git tag -l -n1)
